e_info":{"description":"为见证而来,因铭记而生。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4PgcBCDBhk46g/MpPArbmd+rbIleRgD3lOshLQ5Vp8f","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a86ac1e4866840599bf7dea50fa859ed~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617772&x-signature=hOlRsrV1zoDLZmFh2utCY4v2f9U%3D","user_id":"3808338935816480","user_name":"长枪索命"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3808338935816480","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1745873465,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7189150384961621050","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到赛博朋克夜之城的洛奇偶然间发现自己能给世界安装模组，从此夜之城多了一位活阎王和五位传奇。
ps：女主露西＋丽贝卡
...
荒坂情报档案[飞升科技特别行动小队]
档案概览：
[小队队长：L，在夜之城经营着一家地下诊所，同时也是夜之城的自由佣兵。身上搭载着飞升科技最尖端的外骨骼机甲，危险性极高。第一次目击记录出现在2073年沃森区的地下诊所，暂无更早的情报信息。
小队成员：
杰克，年轻时是海伍德地区瓦罗蒂诺帮的帮派成员，后成为夜之城的自由佣兵，于2074年与队长结识并带领其加入雇佣兵行列。
V，前荒坂反情报部门副部长，于2076年叛逃荒坂并加入该小队。特别注意，情报表明此人全身有多处高强度赛博改造，无法预估赛博精神病的发病风险！若有接触，请随时保持警戒。
大卫-马丁内斯，原荒坂学院学生，于2076年退学并加入小队。此人与情报所提到的V相同，全身高度改造并搭载多个恐怖赛博武器。
露西，疑似叛逃荒坂网络黑客...
丽贝卡，前夜之城曼恩小队成员...
特别注释：
此小队装备的义体和武器大多为神秘武装科技公司“飞升科技”未流通的的尖端技术，功效威力未知，且大多极度危险，需谨慎接触！]","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o567b38edee421474ba9eaf065e93f3bf~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"高维滋崩","author_id":"","book_id":"7189150384961621050","book_name":"赛博朋克：开局小针一扎","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6013人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7209698247051477515","read_count":"6013","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"356011"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"173","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,网游,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f0623d8525dfd1806ac13fd80ebb8a8c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287680&x-signature=7fwrFrfdJuvR%2BVST4OZM8vUv93E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1552930738805927",
